rules:

flavorText: Only a Bisharp that stands above all others in its vast army can evolve into Kingambit.
Bisharp mercilessly cuts its opponents to pieces with the sharp blades covering its body. It will do anything to win.
Blades comprise this Pokémon's entire body. If battling dulls the blades, it sharpens them on stones by the river.

Its fluffy fleece easily stores electricity. Its rubbery hide keeps it from being electrocuted.
Mareep's fluffy coat of wool rubs together and builds a static charge. The more static electricity is charged, the more brightly the lightbulb at the tip of its tail glows.

attacks.name: Mini Drain
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Its fluffy fur is similar in composition to plants. This Pokémon frequently washes its face to keep it from drying out.
